action.reasoning: Observation: Training crashed at first rollout end in MetricsCallback. Error: KeyError: 0 when accessing ep_info_buffer items. Analysis: SB3's VecMonitor stores episode info as dict with keys 'r' (reward), 'l' (length), 't' (time), not tuples. Trying to index with [0] fails. The training itself proceeded past environment creation and started collecting rollouts, so the core pipeline is functional - just the logging callback needs fixing. Decision: Fix callback to use ep['r'] for episode reward from VecMonitor dict. Keep everything else the same (200k timesteps, same hyperparameters) and rerun. Then submit eval immediately after training completes.
